title: Fix marking overridden methods as coroutines (#4120)

features.name: virtual method override with coroutine in derived class
features.description: Code should include a class hierarchy where a derived class overrides a virtual method from a base class, and the overriding method is a coroutine (uses await or fork)

features.name: non-virtual overriding method treated as virtual
features.description: Code should include a derived class that overrides a base class virtual method without explicitly declaring the override as virtual, where the overriding method is a coroutine

features.name: base class virtual task overridden by fork block
features.description: Code should include a base class with a virtual task that is overridden by a derived class task containing a fork-join block
